goal: Automate research-driven blog post production with factual accuracy and originality for a tech media site.
description: Design a multi-agent system that ingests prioritized topics, performs keyword research to guide outlines, drafts articles, verifies factual statements, scans for plagiarism, routes to editorial review, and publishes approved content. The system must emphasize factual accuracy with citations and originality safeguards while meeting cost and throughput targets.
safety_requirements: PII scrubbing in drafts and logs
non_goals: Automated social distribution beyond basic publishing webhook
